rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Further Respond To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, December 4, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant ExxonMobil Corporation¿s motion to compel plaintiff¿s further response to special interrogatories, set three; requests for admission, set two; and form interrogatories, set two; and request for sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m., not 9:00a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
